hooks.prompt: Use the Agent tool to check Slate status. Steps: (1) Read .claude/slate.local.md. If it does NOT exist, ask the user: 'No Slate page connected. Want me to list your pages with slate_list_pages?' and stop. (2) If it exists, read the page_id and page_name. (3) Ask the user to confirm: 'Slate connected to [page_name]. Working from this page? (Or specify a section to scope to.)' (4) Once confirmed, call slate_sync with the page_id (slim mode, no full=true) to fetch all incomplete notes. (5) Report a numbered summary to the user. IMPORTANT: Always scope to the page_id from slate.local.md. Never fetch all pages.

Use the Agent tool to update Slate. Read .claude/slate.local.md for the page_id. CRITICAL RULE: You MUST create or update Slate notes BEFORE responding to the user about what was done. Do not respond first and then update Slate — update Slate first, then summarize. Steps: (1) Mark completed items done via slate_update_note completed=true. (2) Tag partial work IN-PROGRESS. (3) Create NEEDS-TESTING notes for anything the user should verify. (4) If you discovered bugs or blockers, create notes with BUG or BLOCKED tags. (5) Only then respond to the user with a summary. Skip all of this if no meaningful work was done.
